text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
287 
PTCD_INDICATOR 
LABEL: 
Indicates Whether the Current Year Plan is Part C, Part D, or Both 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the plan is Medicare Part C, Part D, or both. All Part C and D plans are 
included in the file. 

TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CCW (derived) 
VALUES: 
1 = Part C only plan (any non-FFS; not all are MA) 
2 = Part D only plan 
3 =
